description: A selfie of a young woman with shoulder-length wavy brown hair, fair skin, and a warm smile, looking directly at the camera with green eyes and subtle makeup. She wears a sleeveless navy blue dress with white geometric paisley print, low V-neckline revealing cleavage, buttons down the front, and a thin black strap over one shoulder. Her right arm is bent with hand on hip, showing a small tattoo on her inner forearm. The background features rugged limestone cliffs with a small pool of standing water, crashing turquoise ocean waves, and a prominent rocky headland on the horizon under a clear blue sky with bright sunlight casting soft shadows. The composition is dynamic with the woman in the foreground against the vast seascape.
location_context: This image appears to be taken at coastal cliffs near Dwejra or Gozo in Malta based on the distinctive limestone geology and headland.
time_context: Mid-morning around 10:14 AM under bright sunny conditions.
